package.name: fc_sim
package.description: ROS2 wrapper around fc_core that drives a simulated quadrotor in Gazebo Harmonic. Ticks Control() at the sim clock rate, applies a FLU/NED frame shim to ROS IMU and odometry, and publishes per-motor angular velocities to MulticopterMotorModel. Designed so the same controller code path runs against the real STM32 firmware over UART.
